sidebar.permissionConfigHint: Permissions are controlled by user roles in User Management. Click to open.

permissionConfig.title: Permissions
permissionConfig.subtitle: Roles, User Management, LLM Configuration
permissionConfig.storeAccessDesc: Configure which stores operators/users can view. Admins and managers see all. Owned stores are auto-visible; here you grant extra access.
permissionConfig.noTargetUsers: No operators/users yet. Create in User Management first.
permissionConfig.howToChangeDesc: Permissions are controlled by each user's role in User Management. Go to User Management, set role (Admin / Manager / Operator / Viewer / User) per user, then save.
permissionConfig.roleAdminDesc: Full access: stores, analysis, tools, user management, workflow, LLM config, feedback.
permissionConfig.roleManagerDesc: Same as Admin: full access including user management and workflow.
permissionConfig.roleOperatorDesc: Stores, analysis, tools, profile; no user management or workflow.

dashboard.title: Store Management
dashboard.subtitle: Configure stores, regions, and upload latest data
dashboard.clickToCreate: Click above to create your first store
dashboard.selectStoreHint: Please select a store from the left sidebar
dashboard.howToImport: How to import: Select a TikTok/Douyin store, click 'Import Data' to upload Excel, then view stats on dashboard.
dashboard.lackOfData: Lack of sufficient data to provide trend
dashboard.comparisonPeriodHint: Sequential comparison: current period vs previous period of same length
dashboard.atLeastOneMetric: At least keep one data metric
dashboard.statsLoadFailed: Failed to load stats. Please check network and retry.
dashboard.noDataInRange: No data for this range. Try another period or import data for this range.
dashboard.selectAtLeastOneInFilter: Select at least one data metric (toggle in filter panel)
dashboard.weekFilterTitle: View tasks by natural week (generation sampling unchanged)

tasks.generatingTitle: Cold starts or server queues can take longer. If nothing new appears for a long time, wait a bit and click Smart Generate again—avoid rapid repeated clicks.
tasks.taskListDescription: Tasks will be created from your operational data
tasks.translatingLong: Translating… Usually about 1–3 min. Cold starts or many tasks can take longer. If it seems stuck, click “Show in current language” again after a short wait (avoid rapid clicks).
tasks.translatePleaseWait: Translation running. If it exceeds ~3 min, try again—often cold start or slow network.
tasks.translateTimeout: Translation timed out. Retry later or reduce task count.
tasks.quotaExceeded: Daily free translation limit reached. Tasks will show in original language. Try again tomorrow or switch to Chinese.
tasks.alreadyTranslated: All tasks already translated to current language
tasks.generateDuplicateAll: Generated {{generated}} suggestions, all duplicate existing tasks; no new tasks added. Complete or close some tasks and try again.
tasks.generateNoNewHint: Refreshed; no new tasks. If you just used Smart Generate and tasks exist, suggestions may have been duplicates—complete or close some and try again.
tasks.generateFailedGeneric: Failed to generate tasks. Check network or sign in again.
tasks.smartGenerateNoPermissionLlmConfig: You don't have permission for smart task generation. Ask an admin to enable it under Admin → LLM settings.
tasks.smartGenerateNoAccessTitle: No permission for smart task generation
tasks.smartGenerateNoAccessSubtitle: Ask an admin to enable it under Admin → LLM settings (same as script generation).
tasks.smartGenerateAskAdminShort: No permission for smart tasks—ask an admin
tasks.generate403FeatureDisabled: Smart task generation is disabled. Ask an admin to enable it under Permission settings.
tasks.generate403NoUserPermission: You don't have permission. Ask an admin to grant access under Admin → Permission settings.
tasks.footerTip: Tasks are auto-generated from operational data. When LLM is configured, AI suggestions are prioritized; otherwise rule templates are used. Click "Smart Generate" to refresh.
tasks.ruleLlmHint: Currently rule tasks only (LLM 0). Configure script LLM and click "Smart Generate"; if still 0, go to
tasks.ruleLlmHintAfter: to check or see backend logs.
tasks.dataSourceSelectTitle: When current store has no data, use another store for generation (tasks still belong to current store)

analysis.title: Data Analysis & Diagnosis
analysis.subtitle: Store data analysis, comparison and diagnosis
analysis.selectStoreHintAnalysis: Select a store above to analyze
analysis.storeCompareDesc: Select multiple stores for data comparison
analysis.lowConversionContent: Current conversion rate is {{rate}}, below industry avg 3.5%. Optimize live script, add interactions, improve product display. Estimated +3% conversion, +{{orders}} orders.
analysis.lowDurationContent: This week total live duration {{duration}}. Recommend 30+ hours. Each extra hour may add GMV {{gmv}}.
analysis.lowInteractionContent: Current interaction rate {{rate}}%. Add giveaways, Q&A. Estimated +15% watch time, +0.5% conversion.

tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: AI tools, script generation, replay analysis, report
tools.selectStoreHint: Select a store above to continue
tools.operatorFeaturesDesc: Use script generation, live replay analysis, reports, market analysis and all tools to improve live performance.
tools.operatorFeaturesStatus: Available now: Script generation (this page). Report, market analysis, live replay analysis, recommendations, etc. are being connected; use the buttons above to try — if you see "Feature not yet available", that tool is not yet open.
tools.screenRecordingDesc: Upload live replay or short video materials for analysis and brand strategy
tools.imageAnalysis: Image Analysis: Product Card & Live Scene
tools.imageAnalysisDesc: Upload product card main images or live scene images for CTR optimization and selling point analysis
tools.reportDesc: Generate period report from store data
tools.marketAnalysisDesc: Enter category and time range for market trends
tools.recommendationsDesc: Generate product recommendations by store and category
tools.statsDesc: Pull and summarize store data for selected period
tools.speechDesc: Enter product and audience for live script generation
tools.compareDesc: Compare GMV, duration, etc. across 2+ stores
tools.assistantDesc: View and handle current store tasks
tools.videoAnalysisFocusPlaceholder: e.g.: Script style, engagement, sales strategy
tools.scriptHint: Fill in product info, select script type and language to generate
tools.scriptHintOther: Click the button below to generate
tools.productSkuHint: If filled, the script will reference this SKU so viewers can order the right item
tools.productFeaturesPlaceholder: Multiple lines OK, e.g. micro-pressure seal, non-stick, all-in-one pot
tools.paramTypeHint: Only show params for selected type
tools.coreFeaturesPlaceholder: Top 1–3 key selling points; will be prioritized
tools.secondaryFeaturesPlaceholder: Extra points: material, safety, durability, etc.
tools.bundleHintText: Sum comes from item list; discount is computed after total price is set.
tools.bundleFeaturesPlaceholder:
Multi-line supported, e.g.:
All kitchen essentials in one set
Unified color scheme
One-pot multi-use
tools.bundleFeaturesHint: Multi-line supported; will be split by newline/semicolon before sending.
tools.fillBundleTotalPrice: Please fill in bundle total price
tools.smartParseDesc: Paste a product spec sheet or description; the system will extract name, selling points and after-sales info into the form automatically.
tools.smartParsePlaceholder:
Paste product document here, e.g.:

Product: Pearl Serum
Selling points:
1. Deep hydration
2. Brightening
Usage tips: morning and night...
tools.parseSuccess: Product info extracted and filled successfully
tools.scriptNoAccessTitle: You don't have permission to generate scripts
tools.scriptNoAccessDesc: Please contact an admin to enable it in Admin → LLM Config.
tools.afterSalesInfoPlaceholder: e.g. 7-day returns, shipping fee rules, warranty period, replacement/return process, support channels
tools.competitorLinkPlaceholder: Paste links (product/shop/notes), or type comparison bullets (their price band, main selling points, specs, gifts)—multiple lines OK
tools.competitorLinkHint: For differentiated pitch; links are often not fetchable—write key facts here; do not invent competitor details not stated above
tools.priceLevelHint: Low/Mid → fast-paced selling script; High → rational persuasion script
tools.productRoleHint: Traffic/Volume + Low/Mid → fast pitch; Profit/Strategic + High → persuasion script
tools.promoPlaceholder: Paste key info: stock, countdown, gifts, limited price…
tools.selectStoreForScript: Please select a store first for script generation
tools.mediaLibraryDesc: Uploaded materials can be used as baseline data for analysis and brand strategy.
tools.dragDropHint: Drag video here or click to select
tools.scriptDisclaimerWithStore: Content above is generated from the selected store's category, audience and recent data. For reference only.
tools.scriptDisclaimerDefault: Content above is generated by the system from current data. For reference only.
tools.translatingLong: Translating… Usually ~1–3 min. Cold starts or large texts may take longer; click translate again if it hangs (avoid rapid clicks).
tools.translationFailed: Translation failed or timed out. Click "Translate" below to retry.
tools.translation404Hint: Translation API not found (404). Please restart the backend server (e.g. npm run dev in backend folder).
tools.scriptTranslationSkipped: Auto-translation to the current language was not applied; content below is in the original language. To get script in English or another language, switch the interface language and generate again.
tools.selectStoreFirstForScript: Please select a store first to generate script based on store data
tools.templateFallbackHint: This is template script (LLM did not return or call failed). Check LLM calling method and API config.
tools.compareNeedTwoStores: At least 2 stores are required to compare
tools.videoUploadBackground: Video uploading—you can keep using other features
tools.videoUploadSuccessAnalyzing: Video uploaded; AI analysis in progress
tools.fallbackTemplateTimeout: Generation timed out or returned empty; switched to template script
tools.fallbackTemplateNoLlm: Script LLM not configured; showing template script
tools.scriptGenerateFailedNetwork: Failed to generate script. Check network or sign in again.
tools.pickVideoFormat: Choose a video file (MP4, WebM, MOV, etc.)
tools.errorReportFailed: Failed to generate report. Check network or sign in again.
tools.errorMarketFailed: Market analysis failed. Check network or sign in again.
tools.errorStatsFailed: Stats failed. Check network or sign in again.
tools.errorScriptFailed: Script generation failed. Check network or sign in again.
tools.errorCompareFailed: Store comparison failed. Check network or sign in again.
tools.errorUploadFailed: Upload failed. Check network or sign in again.
tools.errorRecommendFailed: Recommendations failed. Check network or sign in again.
tools.deleteVideoConfirm: Delete this video and its analysis?

messageCenter.title: Messages
messageCenter.subtitle: Version updates, feedback replies, and system notifications

stats.avgWatchDurationTooltip: Total live duration (min) ÷ viewers, reflects engagement
stats.timelinessTooltip: GMV per hour = GMV ÷ live duration

feedback.submitIntro: Your opinion matters. Please tell us what you think.
feedback.contactHint: Leave contact if you want a reply.

feedbackManage.title: Feedback Management
feedbackManage.subtitle: View and manage user feedback
feedbackManage.replyPlaceholder: Enter your reply (stored with this feedback)
feedbackManage.confirmDelete: Delete this feedback? This cannot be undone.

createStore.title: Create Store
createStore.subtitle: Create a new live-commerce store (reference: Douyin/Shopee seller center)
createStore.countryHint: Default: China; search supported; China & Southeast Asia available
createStore.level1LoadFailed: Level 1 categories failed to load. Ensure backend is running.
createStore.level1NoData: No category data. Run DB reset script and refresh, or ensure backend is running.
createStore.level2NoLevel3Hint: {{count}} level-2 item(s) have no level-3; they will be added
createStore.level2OnlyHint: No level-3 under this level-1; you can add selected level-2 directly
createStore.categoriesHint: Select level 1 (e.g. apparel, beauty, food), then check level 2 & 3, then click «Add selected»
createStore.brandPositioningHint: Confirm or adjust in «Pending tasks» after creation
createStore.brandStrategyHint: Brand strategy will be generated in «Pending tasks»
createStore.pleaseSelectCategories: Select level-3 categories or level-2 with no level-3
createStore.categoriesSelected: {{count}} categories selected; will be saved with the store

common.appRenderFailedHint: Open the browser console for details. If you just deployed or updated, try reloading the page.

dataImport.tiktokDouyinOnly: This feature only supports TikTok / Douyin stores
dataImport.failedCheckFormat: Import failed. Check file format or network

stores.deleteConfirm: Delete this store? This cannot be undone.
stores.deleteFailed: Failed to delete store. Check network or sign in again.

profile.fillPasswordFields: Enter current password, new password, and confirmation
profile.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
profile.emailSameAsCurrent: New email is the same as current

auth.name: Name
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.requestTimeout: Request timed out. Check that the backend is running.
auth.loginFailedCheck: Sign-in failed. Check email and password.

llmPage.title: LLM Invocation Methods
llmPage.subtitle: How the system calls LLMs and where they are used; extensible for more models
llmPage.effectiveMethodHint: The effective method is determined by the API URL in LLM settings.
llmPage.goToStoreManagementSmartGenerate: Go to Store Management · Smart Generate

todo.label: Smart tasks generation
todo.desc: Generate tasks (JSON) in one LLM call based on the store’s recent data; count is controlled by rules.
todo.usedIn: Store Management → Pending Tasks → Smart Generate
todo.detail: callLLMOnce; send systemPrompt + userMessage to Coze or OpenAI-compatible messages. Parse tasks[] from JSON; fallback to rule templates on failure.

anomaly.label: Anomaly analysis tasks
anomaly.desc: When anomalies are detected, generate 1–3 actionable tasks to fix abnormal metrics.
anomaly.usedIn: Smart task generation flow (when anomalies exist)
anomaly.detail: callLLMOnce; input anomalies + store/category/current stats; output JSON tasks. If not configured or fails, returns empty list.

script.label: Script generation (streaming)
script.desc: Generate live-stream scripts based on product, scenario, style, etc. via streaming chunks (typewriter effect).
script.detail: streamScriptFromLLM; Coze uses stream_run SSE; OpenAI-compatible uses stream: true.

future.label: Reserved
future.desc: Reserved for future LLM models or calling patterns (specialized models, multi-turn chat, etc.).
future.detail: When adding new tabs/routes/features, document the entry points and key implementation here.

admin.confirmDeleteUser: Delete this user? This cannot be undone.
admin.fillApiUrlAndKey: Please fill API URL and API key
admin.title: User Management
admin.subtitle: Manage users and permissions
admin.llmConfigDesc: This config is used by all LLM features (smart tasks, script, analysis, etc.). Supports Coze, Doubao, OpenAI. Saved to DB; only admins can edit.
admin.llmUsersPermissionHint: Select users who can use LLM below; select all to apply to everyone.
admin.llmConfiguredHint: Configured; only selected users can use LLM.
admin.apiUrlHint: Default Coze; can switch to Doubao, OpenAI, etc.
admin.apiKeyPlaceholder: Coze: API Token; Doubao/OpenAI: Console API Key
admin.modelPlaceholder: Coze: not needed; Doubao: ep- endpoint ID; OpenAI: optional
admin.featureMappingDesc: Assign which LLM tool each feature uses; unset uses script config or default tool.
admin.savePermissionsOnlyHint: Save user/feature selection only, no API key needed
admin.llmConfigSavedAllUsers: LLM config saved; it applies to all users.
admin.llmConfigSavedSelected: LLM config saved; only selected users can use it.
admin.copyUserId: Copy user ID (e.g. for permission check)
admin.error403: No permission. Only admin or manager can access user management. Please confirm your role.
admin.errorLoadUsers: Failed to load user list. Please try again later.
